records.stderr_pattern: Unsupported Terraform Core version|does not support Terraform version|required_version

avoidance_hints.command: terraform version 2>&1; grep required_version *.tf versions.tf 2>/dev/null || true

records.description: Terraform core version mismatch — check required_version constraint and install matching version

records.stderr_pattern: locked provider.*does not match configured version constraint|provider version mismatch
records.description: Provider version lock mismatch — run terraform init -upgrade to update lock file
